---
title: "Publications"
---

PDFs are available [here]({{< var nextcloud.publications >}}){target=_blank}.

---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  contents: papers
  type: table
  fields: ["date", "author", "title", "publication_header"]
  field-display-names:
    publication_header: "Journal / Conference + details"
  date-format: YYYY
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: [author, title, publication_header]
  categories: true
  page-size: 10
---
